data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for a real-time usage display, specifically the message indicating remaining hours. However, the evidence provided does not include any concrete API reads or persisted state checks that confirm this functionality. The linked use case describes the expected behavior but does not provide the necessary evidence to demonstrate that the system implements this feature effectively, leading to a gap in validation.
gaps: No evidence of API reads or persisted state checks confirming the real-time usage display functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
